summary: Phase 2B Finance Workflow & Ops testing completed. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend pages and workflow actions tested successfully. Settlement workflow (create draft, submit, approve, reject, mark paid), exception queue management (list, filter, resolve, dismiss), and state transition validation all working correctly.

issues: Console shows 400 errors for various API calls (appear to be non-critical background requests)

passed_tests: ✅ PATCH /api/finance/settlement-runs/{run_id}/submit - Submit draft for approval (draft -> pending_approval)
✅ DELETE /api/finance/settlement-runs/{run_id}/remove-entry/{entry_id} - Remove entry from draft (via add test)
✅ Invalid state transitions return error (draft -> approved directly fails with 400)
✅ GET /api/finance/exceptions - List exceptions with filters (status, severity, exception_type)
✅ GET /api/finance/exceptions/stats - Exception statistics by status and severity
✅ Finance Overview page loads with Exception Kuyrugu quick nav card
✅ Settlement Runs page has 'Yeni Taslak' create button
✅ Settlement Run Detail page loads with workflow action buttons
✅ Exception Queue page loads with filters and action buttons
seed_data_creation: Used POST /api/finance/ledger/seed endpoint which creates: 56 ledger entries, 5 settlement runs (SR-001 paid, SR-002 partially_reconciled, SR-003 pending_approval, SR-004 draft, SR-005 approved), 5 agency balances, 4 supplier payables, 3 reconciliation snapshots, 6 finance exceptions (EXC-001 to EXC-006)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2B Workflow & Ops fully tested. Settlement workflow state machine works: draft -> pending_approval -> approved -> paid OR rejected. Exception queue CRUD working. Note: Some test runs modified seeded data (e.g., SR-003 now approved, SR-004 now pending_approval, SR-005 now paid, EXC-001 now resolved, EXC-002 now dismissed). Re-seed before next test run if needed.

mocked_apis.note: All financial data is in-memory mock by design (no real payment gateway). Data seeded via /api/finance/ledger/seed endpoint.
mocked_endpoints: All ledger entries, settlement runs, exceptions stored in MongoDB
No real payment processing - mark-paid only updates status

ui_verification.Finance Overview: ✅ Page loads, shows Exception Kuyrugu nav card
ui_verification.Settlement Runs List: ✅ Page loads, 'Yeni Taslak' button visible, filters work
ui_verification.Settlement Run Detail: ✅ Page loads, shows workflow action buttons based on status
ui_verification.Create Draft Dialog: ✅ Opens, form works, creates draft successfully
ui_verification.Exception Queue: ✅ Page loads, filters work, action buttons visible
